name: Acme Pawn North
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop operating 5 Colorado Springs locations since 1976, offering collateral-based cash loans and buying/selling used merchandise including jewelry, firearms, electronics, and musical instruments.
description_long:
Acme Pawn North is part of Acme Pawn Shops, a family-owned business established in 1976 in Colorado Springs. Now in its 44+ years of operation, the company has grown to five locations and maintains multi-generational family involvement in day-to-day operations. The business has built a local reputation as a trusted pawn shop in the Colorado Springs community.

Acme Pawn offers traditional pawn services: short-term cash loans secured by collateral, retail sales of used merchandise, and direct purchase of items from customers. Their primary merchandise categories include jewelry (gold, silver, diamonds, watches, platinum), firearms and ammunition, musical instruments (guitars, drums, saxophones, brass instruments), power tools, electronics (laptops, tablets, gaming systems, cameras), bicycles and sports equipment, coins and collectibles, antiques, and housewares. They advertise buying broken jewelry and claim to "loan the most on firearms" and offer 10% above cost on new guns.

Distinguishing factors include their emphasis on being family-operated with second and third-generation family members actively working in stores, their claim to pay "top dollar" for pawn loans, their multi-location presence, and their focus on curated merchandise selection. The company maintains an active blog, social media presence, and email subscription service for customer updates on inventory and deals. They received recognition as "2022 Best Pawn Shop."

As a traditional pawn shop, Acme Pawn functions as a short-term lending and used goods marketplace rather than a credit-building or financial education service. Customers should understand that pawn loans are collateral-based with implicit risk of item forfeiture if loans aren't repaid, and that interest rates and terms are not disclosed on their website. The company operates within the pawn shop industry, which has legitimate regulatory oversight but is distinct from banking or formal consumer finance.
address: 3955 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80917

company_info.headquarters: 3955 N Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80917

pros: 44+ year operating history with established local reputation in Colorado Springs
Five location convenience across Colorado Springs area
Multi-generational family ownership with active family involvement in operations
Wide merchandise inventory across 9+ categories including jewelry, firearms, electronics, and musical instruments
Claims to pay competitive rates ("top dollar" pawn loans, 10% above cost on new firearms)
Buys broken jewelry and damaged items, expanding acceptance criteria
Active customer engagement through blog, social media, and email marketing
Award recognition (2022 Best Pawn Shop designation)
cons: No interest rates, loan terms, or fee structures disclosed on website
No information provided on redemption period, default consequences, or item storage policies
Pawn loans result in loss of personal property if not redeemed—higher risk than traditional lending
Website does not explain how appraisals or loan amounts are determined
Limited transparency about firearms licensing compliance or background check procedures despite significant gun inventory
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who have valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments, firearms)
Bargain hunters seeking discounted used merchandise across multiple categories
People buying or selling specific items like firearms, jewelry, or musical instruments locally
Customers in Colorado Springs area seeking convenient multi-location pawn services
diagnosis: Acme Pawn is best for Colorado Springs residents with valuable collateral who need immediate cash or discount shoppers seeking used goods across multiple categories. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-risk short-term borrowing requiring asset forfeiture on default, with no disclosed interest rates or terms on the website—customers should clarify loan conditions and redemption policies before pledging items.
services: Short-term collateral-based cash pawn loans on jewelry, firearms, electronics, and tools
Direct purchase of used merchandise across multiple categories
Gold, silver, diamond, and precious metal jewelry buying and appraisal
Firearms and ammunition sales (new and used) with reported competitive pricing
Musical instrument buying, selling, and pawn services
Power tools and equipment pawn and sales
Electronics buying and selling (computers, tablets, gaming systems, cameras)
Coins, bullion, and collectibles buying and selling
Email subscription service for inventory updates and deals
Multi-location shopping convenience (5 Colorado Springs locations)
